changelog: Performance: static caching for statuses, priorities, ticket types, organizations, users — eliminates repeated DB queries
Performance: translation language resolved once per request instead of 200+ times
Performance: replaced inline SHOW COLUMNS with cached column_exists() across 5 pages
Performance: bulk ticket operations use single IN() query instead of N+1 individual fetches
Performance: ticket list attachment count uses LEFT JOIN instead of correlated subquery
Security: get_client_ip() only trusts forwarded headers from local reverse proxy
Security: integer cast on all echoed ticket IDs in templates
UX: option pills (status, priority, type) converted to buttons — keyboard accessible
UX: flash error messages use role=alert for screen readers
UX: bulk actions on ticket list now preserve active filters after redirect
UX: double-submit protection on new ticket form
Dark mode: fixed internal comment editor missing dark theme overrides
Dark mode: fixed rich-content link hover color in dark mode
Code: defined SESSION_LIFETIME and REMEMBER_ME_DURATION constants
Code: removed dead code — ghost JS selectors, unused POST reads, dead fallback path
